notes: Enterprise-scale data warehouse built on DB2. Evolved into IBM DB2 Warehouse; superseded by IBM Analytics/Cognos post-2007 Cognos acquisition.
10-100GB departmental data marts. Focused on fast installation; targeted OS/2 and Windows NT environments. Superseded by IBM DB2 Data Warehouse Manager.
Evolution of Metaphor DIS; OLAP analytical application server. Discontinued; Cognos PowerPlay/TM1 became IBM's OLAP platform post-2007.

Data mining supporting clustering, classification, prediction, association, sequential pattern discovery. IBM discontinued Intelligent Miner ~2010; capabilities absorbed into SPSS Modeler (IBM acquired SPSS 2009).
RDBMS change capture and replication for data warehouse population. Evolved into IBM InfoSphere Data Replication / IBM Data Replication.
Federated data access across heterogeneous databases. Evolved into IBM WebSphere Federation Server / IBM InfoSphere Federation Server.
Web browser interface to DB2; key Internet-enablement tool for BI Family. Discontinued ~2005 as JSP/servlets became standard.
Core underlying RDBMS for all IBM BI Family products. DB2 remains an active IBM product (IBM Db2 family).
Information catalog allowing end users to browse business-view metadata before drilling down. Concept evolved into modern data catalogs (IBM InfoSphere Information Governance Catalog).
IBM systems management framework integrated with BI Family. Evolved into IBM Tivoli (now IBM Automation).
